test_cases.description: NBA pick with all 5 feature modules wired (points, normal dist)
NFL pick with all 5 feature modules wired (receiving yards, normal dist)
MLB pick with all 5 feature modules wired (hits, normal dist)
NHL pick with all 5 feature modules wired (goals, poisson dist)

note: All 5 feature modules wired (playerForm, opportunity, efficiency, matchup-context via efficiency/game-context inputs, game-context). Hashes computed with JSON.stringify+sha256. NBA/NFL/MLB=normal dist, NHL=poisson dist (goals). run_1 and run_2 hashes are identical — confirmed deterministic. No source changes.
